debug_info.goal:
case h.refine_1.refine_2.«0»
⊢ lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 3)) + lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 3 ^ 4)) ≤
    lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 0 ^ 2 + X 1 ^ 3 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5))

failed_attempts:
(calc lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 3 : MvPolynomial (Fin 6) ℚ)) + lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 3 ^ 4 : MvPolynomial (Fin 6) ℚ))
              = lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X (3 : Fin 6) ^ 5 : MvPolynomial (Fin 6) ℚ)) := by
                simp [degree_X, degree_pow, ← map_add]; ext i; fin_cases i <;> simp
            _ ≤ lex.toSyn (lex.degree (X 0 ^ 2 + X 1 ^ 3 + X 2 ^ 4 + X 3 ^ 5 : MvPolynomial (Fin 6) ℚ)) := by
                apply le_degree; rw [degree_pow, degree_X, mem_support_iff]
                simp only [coeff_add, coeff_X_pow]
                have h2 : (fun₀ | (0 : Fin 6) => (2 : ℕ)) ≠ (fun₀ | (3 : Fin 6) => (5 : ℕ)) := by
                  intro h; have := DFunLike.congr_fun h (0 : Fin 6); simp at this
                have h3 : (fun₀ | (1 : Fin 6) => (3 : ℕ)) ≠ (fun₀ | (3 : Fin 6) => (5 : ℕ)) := by
                  intro h; have := DFunLike.congr_fun h (1 : Fin 6); simp at this
                have h4 : (fun₀ | (2 : Fin 6) => (4 : ℕ)) ≠ (fun₀ | (3 : Fin 6) => (5 : ℕ)) := by
                  intro h; have := DFunLike.congr_fun h (2 : Fin 6); simp at this
                simp [h2, h3, h4])
